title: Create your agency
body: Sign up at safet-ptt.com/signup. Verify your email, pick Basic or Pro, and create your first admin account. You will receive your agency slug for login.

title: Build your channel plan
body: Sign in to safeT Control. Create talkgroups, add radio and dispatcher accounts, and assign channel permissions. Copy the agency radio key for handsets.

title: Install safeT Mobile
body: Download the signed APK from Control → Downloads (or your admin-provided link). Sideload onto Android phones or Inrico IRC590 / TM7 radios. See /setup/android for illustrated handset steps, Vysor, and TM-7 ADB commands.

title: Sign in and go live
body: On each handset enter your agency slug, username, and password. Open safeT Command on a browser for dispatch. Key up — you are on the air.
